title: [v3.2] vendor containers/common@v0.38.6
body:
Fixes the seccomp-profile regression in v3.2

Fixes: #10556
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
@srbala: changing LGTM is restricted to collaborators

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10608#pullrequestreview-679377546):

>/LGTM


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>

@vrothberg any plan for minor release with this fix. [OpenSuse dev releases](https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/) needs update for `3.2.x` including this fix better for simple package users

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *srbala*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.2/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> @vrothberg any plan for minor release with this fix. [OpenSuse dev releases](https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/) needs update for `3.2.x` including this fix better for simple package users

Yes.  This PR is the backport for the 3.2.x of Podman.  @mheon is planning to cut a new release this week.
